This is the brand’s second-largest expanding power solution, which is down from its $6,098 full price to $4,099, but you’ll also be getting an extra $246 savings taken from the tag at checkout. We’ve only seen this price beaten out by the brand’s direct Black Friday sale and some past exclusive deals that dropped costs to the $3,799 low, making this deal here the next-best price with $2,245 total savings. Likewise, the larger DELTA Pro Ultra X Power Station is getting a similar extra savings deal to $7,499 shipped at checkout, which is the best non-exclusive deal we have ever tracked from EcoFlow on this newer and more expansive solution. items.title: Protect your floors with this office chair mat for just $19 Prime shipped (Reg. $40)
items.summary:
Delamu Hard Floor Office Chair Mat

Buy for $19 (Reg. $40)

What we love

If you have a hard floor where you glide your office chair around, this mat can shield it without breaking the bank. It works on everything from hardwood to laminate, tile, vinyl, concrete, and more. The only real exception here is carpet, so it’s not the right fit for that sort of setup.

items.title: Nintendo 2026 leak/rumor roundup: New Zelda, Metroid, StarFox, SE Switch 2, more [Updated]
items.summary:
Update 4/14: This posted has been updated with all of the latest leaks.

In case you somehow missed it, there has been a massive leak over at Nintendo. Somebody is stealing all of the Mushroom Kingdom’s biggest secrets and leaking them all over the internet. As exciting as some of this leaked information is, I almost hope it’s all fake and Nintendo completely surprises everyone over the next few months.

JSAUX Nintendo Switch 2 Glass Screen Protectors (3-pack)

Buy for $7 (Reg. $11)

What we love

Switch 2 costs more than previous-generation models. That’s one more reason to take better care of it, if you ask me. So if you want to prevent scratches, glass protectors like this can help. Today’s offer delivers three for roughly $7, which works out to less than $2.50 each.

items.title: Google adds AI Skills to Chrome to help you save favorite workflows
items.summary: Google is adding “Skills” to Chrome, letting users save and reuse AI prompts across websites. The feature builds on Gemini’s browser integration.

items.title: Save up to 40% on Beatbot’s premium robotic pool cleaners that are all at their lowest prices starting from $499
items.summary:
At Amazon, Beatbot has launched a Pool Opening Sale that can save you up to 40% on a wide array of the brand’s robot pool cleaners. One notable return we’re seeing for a second time is Beatbot’s newest Sora 70 Robotic Pool Cleaner down at $1,199 shipped that comes in a blue or purple colorway. Having just hit the market in mid-February with a $1,499 full price, we currently saw it discounted to $1,349 before the Big Spring Sale event at the end of March when it fell to the $1,199 low. During this sale, you’re getting a second chance at the $300 markdown that returns the costs to its all-time lowest price so far, just in time for you to automate your pool with a more premium option for cleaning during the coming swim season. You can learn more about it below, as well as browse the other robots getting discounts that start from $499.

more…
